chore: security hardening, custom favicon, perf optimizations, and docs update

- Security: add HTTP headers \(X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options: DENY,
  Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy\) via next.config.mjs
- Favicon: replace v0 Next.js logo with custom BudgetBuddy wallet icon
  \(brand colors #34d399 on #0f172a, clean SVG, no v0 PNGs\)
- layout.tsx: simplify icon config to SVG-only, set metadataBase to production URL
- Domain: update all references to finanzas-budget-buddy.vercel.app
- Perf: code-split DashboardPage/SettingsPage/ProfilePage with next/dynamic
- Perf: memoize AppContext value, lazy-init customRange, fix loadingAuth bug
  on fresh sign-in path, memoize totalExpenses/totalIncome/filterLabels
- Fix: remove dead attachment cleanup effect in dashboard \(was stale closure\)
- Deps: remove unused @vercel/analytics \(v0 scaffolding artifact\)
- Docs: rewrite CLAUDE.md and README.md to reflect current Supabase backend,
  multi-provider AI, reset-password page, and new domain
- gitignore: remove stale v0 runtime file entries

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main 2>&1)

feat\(ai\): implement real AI integration for Magic Bar \(Claude, OpenAI, Gemini\)

- lib/ai.ts: new module with callAI\(\) supporting all three providers

  * OpenAI: chat/completions with gpt-4o-mini + json_object response format
  * Gemini: generateContent with gemini-1.5-flash + responseMimeType json

- Response validation: sanitizes icon/category against allowed lists
- Spanish error messages for invalid key, rate limit, network errors

  meaningful error when input is not a transaction

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\mpivi\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\BudgetBuddy" && git add lib/app-context.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: usar ref para evitar redirect al dashboard en cualquier evento de auth

El fix anterior solo ignoraba TOKEN_REFRESHED pero Supabase también puede
emitir SIGNED_IN al volver a la pestaña. Ahora onAuthStateChange lee
currentViewRef \(siempre actualizado\) y solo navega a dashboard si la vista
actual no es una vista autenticada, sin importar el tipo de evento.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main 2>&1)
